name: header
description: The site header: brand, primary navigation, and a prominent action. Sticky by default, and the site's banner landmark.

responsive.base: Brand + a menu toggle; nav collapses into a disclosure.
responsive.lg: Brand left, nav centered/right, action far right on one row.

a11y.landmarkNote: Rendered as <header> with role banner; nav is a <nav> landmark.
notes: The mobile menu toggle exposes aria-expanded and controls the nav panel.
The current page's nav item sets aria-current="page".
The logo link has an accessible name (e.g. "Home").

elementor.notes: Compiles to an Elementor header template: a wide container with brand, Nav Menu widget, and a button.
